2605.09457.title: RAwR: Role-Aware Rewiring via Approximate Equitable Partition
2605.09457.paper_summary: While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated significant efficacy in node classification tasks, where predictions rely on local neighborhood information, the performance of GNNs often drops when prediction tasks depend on long-range interactions. These limitations are attributed to phenomena such as oversquashing, where structural bottlenecks restrict signal propagation across the network topology. To address this challenge, we introduce RAwR, a computationally efficient rewiring framework that augments the input graph with a quotient graph derived from equitable partitions. This approach facilitates accelerated communication between nodes that share identical structural roles, as identified by the Weisfeiler-Leman graph coloring, and thereby reduces the total effective resistance of the system. Furthermore, by employing an approximate definition of the equitable partition, RAwR enables a controllable reduction of the quotient graph, which, in its most condensed state, recovers the conventional Master Node rewiring technique. Empirical evaluations across a diverse suite of benchmarks -- including homophilic, heterophilic, and synthetic long-range datasets -- demonstrate that RAwR achieves state-of-the-art results. Our contribution is further supported by an analytical investigation using a teacher-student model of linear GNNs, which elucidates the theoretical foundations of role-based rewiring. This analysis leads to the formulation of Spectral Role Lift (SRL), a metric designed to identify the optimal approximate equitable partition for maximizing predictive performance.
2605.09457.paper_summary_zh: 雖然圖神經網絡（GNNs）在節點分類任務中顯示出顯著的效能，這些任務依賴於局部鄰域信息，但當預測任務依賴於長距離交互時，GNNs的性能往往會下降。這些限制歸因於如過度壓縮等現象，其中結構瓶頸限制了信號在網絡拓撲中的傳播。為了解決這一挑戰，我們引入了RAwR，一種計算效率高的重連接框架，該框架通過從公平劃分中導出的商圖增強輸入圖。這種方法促進了共享相同結構角色的節點之間的加速通信，這些角色是通過Weisfeiler-Leman圖著色識別的，從而減少了系統的總有效電阻。此外，通過採用公平劃分的近似定義，RAwR使得商圖的可控減少成為可能，這在其最緊湊的狀態下，恢復了傳統的主節點重連接技術。在一系列多樣化的基準測試中進行的實證評估——包括同質性、異質性和合成長距離數據集——顯示RAwR達到了最先進的結果。我們的貢獻進一步得到了使用教師-學生模型的線性GNNs的分析研究的支持，這闡明了基於角色的重連接的理論基礎。這一分析導致了光譜角色提升（SRL）的形成，這是一種旨在識別最佳近似公平劃分以最大化預測性能的度量。
2605.09457.author: Riccardo Porcedda et.al.
2605.09457.authors: Riccardo Porcedda, Giuseppe Squillace, Bastian Epping, Andrea Vandin, Michael Schaub, Mirco Tribastone, Francesca Chiaromonte
